不得不品的一环🤤"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772035050,"group_id":"7601492908025318425","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"子弹要吃最小号@#@","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0zhV79mGfsTAvFd/Rt6lHlYGhF4D+apReTU060U2PNs","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b541ffc8475b4f4a97774cd75b7fb391~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531948&x-signature=t8%2FL6gWhsE7kHZ0%2B99%2BtkbFyOs0%3D","user_id":"3740957737760061","user_name":"爱吃杂鱼的最小号子弹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3740957737760061","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":9,"fan_ranklist_title":"炼铜仔","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601492908025318425","book_info":{"abstract":"胡汉川，男，二十四岁，是学...是社畜。
在这个穿越者多如狗的世界，身为穿越者大军的一员自己老老实实赚钱生活。
一次意识潜入拟真游戏的any%速通直播中，胡汉川打破记录在半小时内完成通关，正准备美美下播的时候发现自己的退出键被抠了！
成百上千万的游戏玩家知道这件事后涌入直播间，更让人离奇诡异的事情是...
你告诉我我玩的不是游戏？而是真的在异世界展开了一场惊心动魄的大冒险？
歪特？
玩个游戏还能二次穿越的？
还有你告诉我游戏里的妹子也是真的？
那自己曾经玩过那么多游戏，那些妹子不会全找过来吧？
什么叫修萝场？？？？？？？
你说她们打起来了是什么意思？？？？？？
等等，你这头肥鸡！还有你这头傲娇蠢龙！不要在把自己下的蛋拿来西红柿炒蛋了！我已经吃撑了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od2b79a4a05c3118584479de62dccedd6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"细枝硕果萝莉猫娘","author_id":"","book_id":"7601492908025318425","book_name":"羞萝场玩家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#404038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601523772897624600","read_count":"12208","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"304880"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"125","tags":"游戏体育,异世大陆,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic-r/2db15f18d2d9b40f6cd28ce746382da0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183299&x-signature=XdP6FxOKYmf50up6UJ6uu0omcTs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1183528857642944","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7266,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3426},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611443259317158680","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"蛮好看的，刚开始看是因为女主是萝莉这本书感觉越看越好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772180326,"group_id":"7601492908025318425" 在这个穿越者多如狗的世界，身为穿越者大军的一员自己老老实实赚钱生活。
一次意识潜入拟真游戏的any%速通直播中，胡汉川打破记录在半小时内完成通关，正准备美美下播的时候发现自己的退出键被抠了！
成百上千万的游戏玩家知道这件事后涌入直播间，更让人离奇诡异的事情是...

等等，你这头肥鸡！还有你这头傲娇蠢龙！不要在把自己下的蛋拿来西红柿炒蛋了！我已经吃撑了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od2b79a4a05c3118584479de62dccedd6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"细枝硕果萝莉猫娘","author_id":"","book_id":"7601492908025318425","book_name":"羞萝场玩家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#404038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601523772897624600","read_count":"12208","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"304880"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"125","tags":"游戏体育,异世大陆,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic-r/2db15f18d2d9b40f6cd28ce746382da0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183299&x-signature=XdP6FxOKYmf50up6UJ6uu0omcTs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1183528857642944","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"87"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7978,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":109},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606941931268653848","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看到第15章了，虽然感觉看的有点少评价有点不准确，可能所以以下仅为目前个人观点:
首先，这个作品一开始我没怎么看懂后面穿越的第二个事件游戏个人感觉借鉴了一部分《终焉的莉莉丝》这部作品和它的二代作品。
并且如果只是想看纯爱剧情的话可能会让大家稍微失望一下。在15章或者以前重点还是主要推的是主线剧情，没怎么看到男女主的互动或者说，我目前都没看到具体哪个是女主（主角捏的那个萝莉和显卡除外）
其次书名是说有直播简介也强调了一下直播让人误以为穿越之后。每一次互动都会有直播以至于有网友的参与。但实际上穿越到第二个世界之后，就跟直播切割断联了（不排除后续接通轨道，继续直播）
说实话，我没有看过作者前一部的作品所以我想说主角在第一个事件里对待NPC的态度虽然很跟现实挂钩但是这就和第二部对待NPC的态度形成一个微弱的对比感觉割裂感稍微有点大没有一些逻辑性
（以上仅为个人观点，如果要反驳的话，我希望有一些逻辑性，而并非为了喷而喷。当然，目前我才看到第15章这个书评只能起一个试试看的态度，而并非是一个总体性态度希望各位书友们理性鉴别）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771132263,"group_id":"7601492908025318425","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看书，爱书，写书，懂书，见人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7WwNwX1z0sImoRkSYmnO7IWjNPFvY7EHx57U1x+cWvb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6ea1ffcb9ed3483f83911387a760cbd8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532298&x-signature=ep3JFDa%2BZTKxsoZs2FhTsGOKF%2BE%3D","user_id":"2774778188932612","user_name":"蚕楠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2774778188932612","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601492908025318425","book_info":{"abstract":"胡汉川，男，二十四岁，是学...是社畜。
在这个穿越者多如狗的世界，身为穿越者大军的一员自己老老实实赚钱生活。
一次意识潜入拟真游戏的any%速通直播中，胡汉川打破记录在半小时内完成通关，正准备美美下播的时候发现自己的退出键被抠了！
成百上千万的游戏玩家知道这件事后涌入直播间，更让人离奇诡异的事情是...
你告诉我我玩的不是游戏？而是真的在异世界展开了一场惊心动魄的大冒险？
歪特？
玩个游戏还能二次穿越的？
还有你告诉我游戏里的妹子也是真的？
那自己曾经玩过那么多游戏，那些妹子不会全找过来吧？
什么叫修萝场？？？？？？？
你说她们打起来了是什么意思？？？？？？
